prompt: Edit image 1: Apply the dark, high-tech gaming website theme and aesthetic from image 2, including the style of the main header image area and headline text, to transform the layout and feel.
prompt_refined: Edit `image 1`. Apply the dark, high-tech gaming website theme and aesthetic from `image 2`. Transform the entire top section of `image 1`, from its existing navigation bar down to and including the 'Leadership' title, into a prominent hero banner. This new hero banner should adopt the immersive visual style, dark background elements, and overall layout of `image 2`'s main header image area. Redesign the 'Leadership' title in `image 1` to match the bold, stylized, and prominent typography of the headline text from `image 2` (e.g., 'LEVEL UP YOUR GAMING EXPERIENCE!'). Ensure the overall design and feel of `image 1`'s webpage reflect the sleek, futuristic, and dark aesthetic of `image 2`.
objects: Immersive, dark-toned graphical background within the hero banner
Large, stylized "Leadership" title text (within the hero banner)
Website navigation links (styled to match dark, high-tech theme)
Profile images of individuals (e.g., CEO, VPs)
Associated text for profile images (names, titles)
